name: RUNALL_VERIFIED_RESTRICTED_CONTINUATION_PDE_TO_DERIVATIVE_IDENTITY_LEMMA_TARGET

runall_target_manifest.COMMIT_RULE: Commit only if the targeted verifier and targeted pytest pass.

lemma_statement_surface.input_equation: partial_t u = L_R(t, x, D) u + N_R(t, x, u, D u) + F_R(t, x)
lemma_statement_surface.boundary_convention: outward normal on boundary of Sigma_R
lemma_statement_surface.shared_input_surface: the same restricted continuation input surface used by the concrete analytic input package

required_derivation_components.role: substitute partial_t u from the restricted evolution equation into d/dt E_R(t)
move spatial derivatives and isolate boundary flux terms on Sigma_R
bound lower-order nonlinear and source contributions by Source_R(t)
assemble the previous components into d/dt E_R(t) + Flux_R(t) <= Source_R(t)

boundary: this artifact records the derivative identity lemma target only
this artifact does not prove energy differentiability
